title: AnnotationsQueue
description: Queue of paper-current.html annotations sent by Gonzalo via ntfy and received by W12. Each item tracks its lifecycle: received -> processed -> edit_applied by the W14 5-phase validator.

version.description: Monotonic version of the annotations queue document.

last_poll_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp of the last ntfy poll performed by W12.

annotation_id.description: Unique identifier of the annotation, generated by the frontend.

selection_start.description: Character offset where the selection starts within the paragraph.

selection_end.description: Character offset where the selection ends within the paragraph. Must be > selection_start.

color.description: Highlight color used by Gonzalo (yellow=note, green=approve, red=fix).

comment.description: Gonzalo's free-form comment attached to the annotation.

ts.description: Browser-side ISO8601 timestamp when Gonzalo created the annotation.

received_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when W12 received the annotation via ntfy.

processed.description: True once W14 has attempted to process the annotation.

processed_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when W14 finished processing the annotation, or null if not yet processed.

w14_run_id.description: GitHub Actions run id for the W14 workflow that processed this annotation, or null.

edit_applied.description: True if the 5-phase validator accepted the edit and it was applied to the manuscript.
